Uno Platform Secures $3.5M Seed Round to Accelerate Patent-Pending Visual Design & AI Tooling for .NET Developers MONTREAL, August 12, 2025--Uno Platform is proud to announce the completion of a $3.5M CAD seed funding round. This round, led by AQC Capital and Desjardins Capital, rounds up $6.5M CAD of total investment in Uno Platform to date, and includes participation from Scott Hanselman, Microsoft VP Developer Community and angel investor.

Healthcare Activation Company, Pyx Health, Ranks No. 661 on the 2025 Inc. 5000 List of America’s Fastest-Growing Private Companies NEW YORK, August 12, 2025--In its annual list of the fastest growing private companies in America, leading media brand Inc. today revealed that Pyx Health has ranked number 661, denoting its fourth consecutive appearance on the Inc. 5000. FINBOA ranked #746 overall, #76 among U.S. software companies, and #79 among Texas-based companies. ColdTrack Named to Inc. 5000 for Fifth Consecutive Year, Cementing Its Status as a National Growth Leader NEW YORK, August 12, 2025--ColdTrack, the leading provider of fulfillment and software services purpose-built for cold and frozen eCommerce brands, today announced it secured a ranking on the 2025 Inc. 5000 list of the fastest-growing private companies in America. By securing a spot on the 2025 list, ColdTrack has reached a milestone fewer than 1% of companies have achieved, according to Enterprise Knowledge: being recognized on the Inc. 5000 for five consecutive years.

It's a Threepeat! F&I Sentinel Named to Inc. 5000 List of Fastest-Growing Private Companies in America for Third Straight Year F&I Sentinel, the leader in tech-enabled solutions for finance and insurance products (F&I) to the automotive finance industry, is proud to announce its inclusion on the esteemed Inc. 5000 list of fastest-growing companies for the third straight year. F&I Sentinel ranked #1,931 on the 2025 list and #117 in the financial services industry as a whole, a big jump from its place on the 2024 list and a clear indication of the company's unwavering commitment to innovation and excellence.
